name: stackos
description: Repo-agnostic StackOS project, plugin, workflow-template, run-plan, and action runtime for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Manage StackOS projects and plugin run plans from any repo.
interface.longDescription: Use the local StackOS daemon for projects, plugin catalogs, credentials, reusable workflow templates, run plans, resources, actions, and audit trails.
defaultPrompt: Use StackOS to connect this repository to a project.
Use StackOS workflow templates and run plans for the next project task.
